description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

You secrete a slick and slippery slime when speed is of the essence. Until the end of your turn, when you leave a square, you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Slime Squirt] in that square. If you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Immobilized], or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Restrained], you can attempt to Escape with a +2 circumstance bonus. You can then Stride. During this Stride, you have a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed.
